name: [Zoo Escapee:] Rafail
description:
After his mate and his other cubs got poached he was found with his only surviving son. He was transferred to the zoo shortly after. Everyone was really excited to see the newest edition of the demi-human zoo, but it seems like papa leopard has other things in mind.
